articles.author: AI AGI
articles.description:
This is a submission for the Runner H "AI Agent Prompting" Challenge

  
  
  What I Built

I built a smart health optimization agent that manages every aspect of a user’s wellness journey. From tracking daily metrics to suggesting personalized improvements, it automates health insights, fitness scheduling, meal planning, and progress reporting. This agent is designed to reduce the effort required to manage multiple wellness goals simultaneously.

  
  
  Demo here full run

articles.author: Hamza B
articles.description:
Here is the case, i have data coming from free text input source, it is related to the degree and education level of the users
There are many typos, many crazy stuff going on in the data, there are over 10m records, the data could be anything from typos, some their industry, some have their GPA, some even their tech stack, some data coming in English, some in Spanish
I want to categorize the data by adding a new column with the official degree name to each line
This is sample data
id;name;cluste
